Contactez nous via le numéro vert dédié: Contact us via the dedicated toll-free number
Landing description: Instituted by presidential decree, the 4th General Population and Housing Census (GPHC) aims to provide exhaustive data on the population to better plan Cameroon's development. The census is everyone's business: let's contribute to its success because every inhabitant counts!
A Propos footer: The General Population and Housing Census is an operation that consists of collecting data on the demographic, cultural, and economic characteristics, as well as the housing and living environment of individuals.
